title: Maybe Baby Its on Me
lyrics: ♪ ♪ ♪ ♪  ♪ ♪  ♪ ♪ You know when you walked in the door I lost my mind Girl you were so beautiful the sun didn't compare How them hips swayed in the air Girl I look at you and see a picture That I've never seen before Kids running on the floor While we rocked in chairs Wondering who the hell they are That's right girl Baby it's all me All the fights, all the lies All the reasons why you couldn't sleep tonight There's some in the bathroom downstairs Trying to write the right words Well maybe, baby it's all me Maybe it's all on me Couldn't give you the stability, protection you need Now baby maybe it's all on me Now remember when I left that time I went to Alabama State Did some shows there Told you that the girls weren't great Nothing to look at, nothing like you Couldn't compare Man girl your hair, your personality Was everything to me Told them little girls to move I'll go play at the fair Find you a boy that you can treat unfair Cause me I'm waiting for you to get home My girls they're all alone Baby baby you won't throw me away If I say all the right words tonight Now baby maybe Hey yo let me stay Cause maybe it's all me All the fights, all the dark in our life It's all me Best you go run free Cause it's all me It's all on the door Comments on the scribe on the way All the music in the gym and I Inside the mood we hide in our own vacant eyes Maybe it's all me At least I can look at me that way Have accountability Until it truly changes everything about me Girl please come It's all me Yeah maybe maybe it's all me

lyricsSegments.text: You know when you walked in the door I lost my mind
Girl you were so beautiful the sun didn't compare
How them hips swayed in the air
Girl I look at you and see a picture
That I've never seen before
Kids running on the floor
While we rocked in chairs
Wondering who the hell they are
That's right girl
Baby it's all me
All the fights, all the lies
All the reasons why you couldn't sleep tonight
There's some in the bathroom downstairs
Trying to write the right words
Well maybe, baby it's all me
Maybe it's all on me
Couldn't give you the stability, protection you need
Now baby maybe it's all on me
Now remember when I left that time I went to Alabama State
Did some shows there
Told you that the girls weren't great
Nothing to look at, nothing like you
Couldn't compare
Man girl your hair, your personality
Was everything to me
Told them little girls to move
I'll go play at the fair
Find you a boy that you can treat unfair
Cause me I'm waiting for you to get home
My girls they're all alone
Baby baby you won't throw me away
If I say all the right words tonight
Now baby maybe
Hey yo let me stay
Cause maybe it's all me
All the fights, all the dark in our life
It's all me
Best you go run free
Cause it's all me
It's all on the door
Comments on the scribe on the way
All the music in the gym and I
Inside the mood we hide in our own vacant eyes
Maybe it's all me
At least I can look at me that way
Have accountability
Until it truly changes everything about me
Girl please come
It's all me
Yeah maybe maybe it's all me
